allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('c:/Projects/my-website/game-trivia.js', 'utf8'\); const m = code.match\(/const IMPOSSIBLE_BANKS = \\{\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\n\\};/\); if\(!m\){console.log\('NOT FOUND'\); process.exit\(1\);} const body = m[1]; const keys = [...body.matchAll\(/^\\s\\s\([a-z]+\):\\s\\[/gm\)].map\(x=>x[1]\); console.log\('Banks found:', keys\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const code = fs.readFileSync\('c:/Projects/my-website/game-trivia.js', 'utf8'\); const m = code.match\(/const IMPOSSIBLE_BANKS = \\{\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\n\\};/\); const body = m[1]; const keys = [...body.matchAll\(/^\\s\\s\([a-z]+\):\\s\\[/gm\)].map\(x=>x[1]\); console.log\('Banks:', keys.length, '→', keys.join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('c:/Projects/my-website/game-trivia.js','utf8'\);const m=c.match\(/dnd: \\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\],\\s+warhammer:/\); const body=m[1]; ['Dragonlance','Takhisis','Cataclysm','Krynn','Dark Sun','Athas'].forEach\(t=>{const re=new RegExp\(t\);if\(re.test\(body\)\){const ln=body.split\('\\n'\).findIndex\(l=>l.match\(re\)\);console.log\('Hit:', t, '→ line:', body.split\('\\n'\)[ln].trim\(\)\);}}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const c=fs.readFileSync\('c:/Projects/my-website/game-trivia.js','utf8'\);const start=c.indexOf\('IMPOSSIBLE_BANKS = {'\);const m=c.slice\(start\).match\(/dnd: \\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\],\\s+warhammer:/\); const body=m[1]; const terms=['Dragonlance','Takhisis','Cataclysm','Krynn','Dark Sun','Athas','Hickman','Weis']; const hits=terms.filter\(t=>new RegExp\(t\).test\(body\)\); console.log\(hits.length===0?'✓ Impossible D&D bank is clean.':'Hits: '+hits.join\(', '\)\);")
